debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ C, ∃ (_ : Convex ℝ C), ∃ x y, ∀ (i : ℕ) (s : Set ℕ), x i + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s

failed_attempts:
⟨{p : Fin 3 → ℝ | p 2 > 0 ∧ p 1 ^ 2 < p 0 * p 2},
    by {
      refine' convex_of_sublevel_set _ _,
      exact fun p ↦ p 0 * p 2 - p 1 ^ 2,
      exact fun p q t ht₀ ht₁ ↦ by {
        simp only [Fin.forall_fin_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_two, Pi.add_apply,
          Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul] at *,
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (t * (q 1 - p 1) + p 1),
          mul_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr ht₀.1) (sub_nonneg.mpr ht₁.1)]
      },
      exact fun p ↦ p 2,
      exact fun p ↦ p 2 > 0
    },
    fun i ↦ ![2 ^ i, 2 ^ (2 * i), 1],
    fun s ↦ ![∑ j in s, 2 ^ j, ∑ j in s, 2 ^ (2 * j), 0],
    fun i s ↦ by {
      simp only [Fin.forall_fin_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_two, Pi.add_apply]
      constructor
      · intro h
        have : (∑ j in s, 2 ^ j) ^ 2 < (2 ^ i + ∑ j in s, 2 ^ j) * 1 := by
        { 
          have : (∑ j in s, 2 ^ j) ^ 2 = ∑ j in s, ∑ k in s, 2 ^ (j + k) := by
            simp [pow_add, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum]
          rw [this]
          have : 2 ^ (2 * i) = (2 ^ i) ^ 2 := by ring
          rw [← this]
          have : ∀ j k : ℕ, j ∈ s → k ∈ s → j + k ≠ 2 * i ∨ j = i ∧ k = i := by
            intros j k hj hk
            contrapose!
            intro h'
            have : j + k = 2 * i := by omega
            have : j ≤ 2 * i ∧ k ≤ 2 * i := by
            { 
              apply And.intro
              · nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) j]
              · nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) k]
            }
            omega
          sorry
        }
        nlinarith
      · intro h
        have : (∑ j in s, 2 ^ j) ^ 2 < (2 ^ i + ∑ j in s, 2 ^ j) * 1 := by
          nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) i]
        nlinarith
    }⟩

⟨{p | p 0 * p 1 ≥ p 2}, convex_of_is_convex_on {p | p 0 * p 1 ≥ p 2} (by
    { intros a b ha hb t ht,
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *,
      have h₁ : (t • a + (1 - t) • b) 0 = t * a 0 + (1 - t) * b 0 := by simp [smul_add, add_smul],
      have h₂ : (t • a + (1 - t) • b) 1 = t * a 1 + (1 - t) * b 1 := by simp [smul_add, add_smul],
      have h₃ : (t • a + (1 - t) • b) 2 = t * a 2 + (1 - t) * b 2 := by simp [smul_add, add_smul],
      rw [h₁, h₂, h₃],
      nlinarith [mul_self_nonneg (a 0 - b 0), mul_self_nonneg (a 1 - b 1),
        mul_self_nonneg (a 0 - b 1), mul_self_nonneg (a 1 - b 0)] }),
    fun i => ![2^i, 2^i, 2^(2*i)],
    fun s => ![0, 0, -∑ i in s.toFinite, 2^(2*i)],
    by
    { intros i s,
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one],
      norm_num,
      split,
      { intro h,
        have h' : ∑ j in s.toFinite, 2^(2*j) ≥ 2^(2*i) := by
          { cases' mem_toFinite_iff.2 (by simpa using h) with _ hs,
            exact Finset.single_le_sum (fun j _ => pow_nonneg (by norm_num) _) hs },
        linarith },
      { intro h,
        have h' : ∑ j in s.toFinite, 2^(2*j) ≥ 2^(2*i) := by
          { cases' mem_toFinite_iff.2 h with _ hs,
            exact Finset.single_le_sum (fun j _ => pow_nonneg (by norm_num) _) hs },
        nlinarith } }⟩

⟨{p : Fin 3 → ℝ | p 2 > 0 ∧ p 1 ^ 2 < p 0 * p 2},
    by {
      refine' convex_of_isOpen _,
      exact isOpen_lt continuous_fst continuous_const,
      intro p q hp hq t ht,
      have h₀ : (t • p + (1 - t) • q) 2 = t * p 2 + (1 - t) * q 2 := by simp [smul_add, add_smul, smul_smul, mul_assoc],
      have h₁ : (t • p + (1 - t) • q) 1 ^ 2 < (t • p + (1 - t) • q) 0 * (t • p + (1 - t) • q) 2 := by
      {
        rw [← sub_pos],
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (p 1 - q 1), hp.1, hq.1, ht.1, ht.2, hp.2, hq.2]
      },
      exact ⟨by linarith [hp.1, hq.1, ht.1, ht.2], h₁⟩
    },
    fun i => ![2 ^ i, 2 ^ (2 * i), 1],
    fun s => ![-∑ j in s, 2 ^ j, -∑ j in s, 2 ^ (2 * j), 0],
    by {
      intro i s,
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero],
      constructor
      · intro h,
        simp_all only [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_two, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero, zero_add, one_mul,
          add_zero, pow_zero, pow_one, Nat.cast_succ, add_right_neg, add_zero]
        have h₁ : (∑ j in s, 2 ^ j) ≤ ∑ j in s, 2 ^ j := le_refl _
        have h₂ : (∑ j in s, 2 ^ (2 * j)) ≤ ∑ j in s, 2 ^ (2 * j) := le_refl _
        contrapose! h
        nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) i, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) (2 * i)]
      · intro h,
        simp_all only [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_two, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero, zero_add, one_mul,
          add_zero, pow_zero, pow_one, Nat.cast_succ, add_right_neg, add_zero]
        have h₁ : 0 < 1 := by norm_num
        have h₂ : (2 ^ i - ∑ j in s, 2 ^ j) ^ 2 < (2 ^ (2 * i) - ∑ j in s, 2 ^ (2 * j)) * 1 := by
        {
          cases' h with h h
          · nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) i, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) (2 * i)]
          · nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) i, pow_pos (by norm_num : 0 < 2) (2 * i)]
        }
        exact ⟨by norm_num, h₂⟩
    }⟩
